summary: High‑energy second set with soaring China>Rider and tight jams
blurb: Second set drives the night with a seamless China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider segue, a fiery Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World stretch, and a jubilant Around → Around closer. Jerry’s gritty vocals and fluid guitar shine, complemented by Brent’s sweet organ and strong drum/space interplay. Highlights include Bird Song, Tom Thumb's Blues duet and a passionate rendition of It’s All Over Now Baby Blue.
review:
The April 1, 1985 show at the Cumberland County Civic Center captures the Dead in a high‑energy stride that many fans still cite as a spring ’85 highlight. While the first set runs a solid but straightforward course (Bertha, Greatest Story Ever Told, West L.A. Fadeaway, Little Red Rooster, Bird Song, Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues, Looks Like Rain, Might As Well), it’s the second set that truly ignites: a flawless China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider transition launches into a soaring Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World jam, followed by an expansive Drums‑>Space and a relentless The Other One that rolls straight into a soulful Stella Blue. The night caps off with a joyous Around → Around into Not Fade Away, then a tender encore of It’s All Over Now Baby Blue. Jerry’s voice is rugged yet powerful, his guitar fluid and “extra good” on the solos, and he even shares vocal duties with Phil on Tom Thumb's Blues—a rare duet that fans love. Brent’s organ provides a sweet, enveloping texture throughout, while Mickey and Bill turn the drums/space segment into a highlight of its own. The audience recording identified as the best (gd85-04-01.oade.connor.8521.sbeok.shnf) delivers crystal‑clear immersion with no drop‑outs, making those soaring moments feel immediate and vivid.

Overall, this show balances tight musicianship with the spontaneous magic that defines a great Dead night. The second‑set flow is seamless, the setlist hits several high points—Bird Song, China > Rider, Tom Thumb’s Blues duet, and a heartfelt Dylan cover—and the recording quality lets listeners experience the full punch of the performance. It’s a solid recommendation for anyone looking to hear the band in top form during their mid‑80s era.

rating_calculation.sentiment_rationale: Three recordings are clearly positive, praising high‑energy jams, standout songs (Bird Song, China>Rider, Tom Thumb's Blues) and strong band interplay; two mixed reviews note only minor recording quirks; one negative review calls the setlist "very normal" but offers no performance criticism. The net sentiment is solidly positive, warranting a moderate boost.

best_recording.reason: Excellent audience tape with crisp, immersive sound and no drop‑outs; captures the high‑energy second set and all highlighted songs clearly.

key_highlights: High‑energy second set with seamless China > Rider segue and a soaring Estimated Prophet > Eyes jam
Rare Jerry–Phil vocal duet on Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues and a heartfelt Dylan cover encore
Brent’s sweet organ tone threads through the show, especially on Bird Song
Audience recording offers crystal‑clear detail and balances crowd ambience with instrument clarity
song_highlights: It's All Over Now Baby Blue

band_performance.Jerry: Rugged yet powerful vocals; fluid, extra‑good guitar work with standout solos and a duet on Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues.
band_performance.Phil: Delivers the classic April Fools joke after Tom Thumb, shares vocal spotlight in the duet, and adds strong bass-driven presence throughout.
band_performance.Bob: Passionate vocal delivery on Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World, adding intensity to the jam sections.
band_performance.Brent: Sweet organ tone that underpins the entire set, providing a warm, melodic foundation especially evident on Bird Song.
band_performance.Mickey: Strong contribution in the Drums‑>Space segment, giving the second set an extra burst of rhythmic energy.
band_performance.Billy: Powerful drumming throughout; pairs with Mickey to drive the expansive jams and maintains tight groove during transitions.

must_listen_sequences: It's All Over Now Baby Blue
